# Lucky X — ServiceNow Certification Practice Tests

> luckyx.dev is a ServiceNow certification exam prep platform by Lukasz Szumilas. All courses are published on Udemy.

## Key Facts
- 18 ServiceNow certification practice test courses
- 4,800+ practice questions with sourced explanations
- 10,000+ students enrolled
- 4.6 average rating across all courses
- Author: Lukasz Szumilas — passed all 18 ServiceNow certification exams on the first attempt
- All courses priced at $9.99 (coupon) or $99.99 (list)

## Courses

- [CIS Data Foundations / CSDM](https://luckyx.dev/courses/cis-data-foundations.html): 470 questions — CMDB health, CSDM, prerequisite for 7 other certs
- [CSA System Administrator](https://luckyx.dev/courses/csa.html): 392 questions — broadest ServiceNow exam
- [CAD Certified Application Developer](https://luckyx.dev/courses/cad.html): 325 questions — scripting, Flow Designer, scoping
- [CIS-ITSM IT Service Management](https://luckyx.dev/courses/cis-itsm.html): 198 questions — incident, problem, change, request
- [CIS-CSM Customer Service Management](https://luckyx.dev/courses/cis-csm.html): 340 questions — case work, portals, entitlements
- [CIS-SPM Strategic Portfolio Management](https://luckyx.dev/courses/cis-spm.html): 350 questions — demand, project, portfolio, resource
- [CIS-Discovery / RISCO](https://luckyx.dev/courses/cis-discovery.html): 173 questions — discovery, RISCO, MID Servers
- [CIS-Service Mapping](https://luckyx.dev/courses/cis-service-mapping.html): 270 questions — entry points, patterns, traffic
- [CIS-SAM Software Asset Management](https://luckyx.dev/courses/cis-sam.html): 220 questions — normalization, licensing, reclamation
- [CIS-HAM Hardware Asset Management](https://luckyx.dev/courses/cis-ham.html): 240 questions — receiving to disposal lifecycle
- [CIS-FSM Field Service Management](https://luckyx.dev/courses/cis-fsm.html): 264 questions — dispatch, work orders, mobile
- [CIS-SIR Security Incident Response](https://luckyx.dev/courses/cis-sir.html): 281 questions — security workflows, response logic
- [CIS-VR Vulnerability Response](https://luckyx.dev/courses/cis-vr.html): 213 questions — findings, prioritization, exceptions
- [CIS-HRSD HR Service Delivery](https://luckyx.dev/courses/cis-hrsd.html): 220 questions — COEs, lifecycle events, employee center
- [CIS-GRC/IRM Risk & Compliance](https://luckyx.dev/courses/cis-grc-irm.html): 300 questions — policy, risk, compliance
- [CIS-Event Management](https://luckyx.dev/courses/cis-event-management.html): 200 questions — event rules, alert noise, connectors
- [CIS-TPRM Third-Party Risk Management](https://luckyx.dev/courses/cis-tprm.html): 180 questions — assessments, engagements, vendor risk
- [CAS-PA Performance Analytics](https://luckyx.dev/courses/cas-pa.html): 216 questions — indicators, breakdowns, dashboards
